title: After the Arima Kinen: Long-Awaited Victory

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the first one across finish line is....
Matikanetannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad she won! She did such a great job!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Thanks for sharing your courage with me!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: I'm going to do my best too! Thanks, Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The roaring cheers engulf Matikanetannhauser as
she looks up to the stands from the turf.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: There are so many smiling faces! So, so many!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: (I... did it!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the star of today's race is
Matikanetannhauser! She's dedicating her
long-awaited victory to the spectators!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What a beautiful sight... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! I won. I think that's earned me some
bragging rights.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: For now, it's time to go grab something yummy.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: MACHITAAAN!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Congrats on the win!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you! You're an energetic one, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'm the slowest one in my club. I never
win, and I've got no talent. B-but, still...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I won't let that stop me! I wanna do my best, just
like you!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: So thank you! Bye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The girl runs off with a new spring in her step.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I guess you could say I'm her star.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Heh. Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: That's got a nice ring to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser watches the girl's back until
she's out of sight.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mm... All right. Let's head back.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
My racing career's just getting started, so I can't
be satisfied with just this win!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Got that, Trainer? Let's keep giving it our all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Matikanetannhauser exits the Arima
Kinen with renewed determination.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Oops! I think I left my phone in the waiting
room!
